distance_km.note: No reliable web sources found mentioning 'Bukovel Ski Marathon' or its distance; search results discuss ski pistes (up to 5km) and trail runs but no cross-country ski race of 30km[1][2][3][5]

elevation_m.note: No sources confirm total elevation gain of 350m for any cross-country ski marathon at Bukovel; Bukovel ski pistes have altitude differences up to 285m but no specific XC race data[2]

country.note: Bukovel ski resort is confirmed in Ukraine[2][4]

discipline.note: No sources mention classic or skate disciplines for a 'Bukovel Ski Marathon'; Bukovel has alpine skiing and biathlon track but no XC specifics[2]

field_size.note: No sources confirm typical 250 participants for this race; other Bukovel events like Buko Trail had 800 but not ski marathon[1]

founded.note: No sources confirm first edition in 2010 for 'Bukovel Ski Marathon'; resort events mentioned from 2016 but no XC race history[2]

official_website_url.note: https://bukovel.com is the official Bukovel resort site with events section[1][3][5][6]

race_date.note: No sources confirm typical February date for 'Bukovel Ski Marathon'; Bukovel is winter ski resort but no specific race dates[2][4]
